name: NCR Voyix Corporation
description: NCR Voyix Corporation is a leading global provider of digital commerce solutions, specializing in software, consulting, and technology for the retail and restaurant industries. The company transforms retail stores and restaurant systems through comprehensive, platform-led SaaS and services capabilities, including point-of-sale, payments, and checkout solutions. By leveraging deep industry expertise and AI-powered insights, NCR Voyix helps businesses create seamless, connected experiences for both operators and customers. Headquartered in the United States, the company supports mission-critical operations for innovators worldwide, focusing on scalability, security, and operational efficiency to drive growth in modern commerce environments.
